title: completeCombatManager
description: A fully functional, all you would need combat manager for your server. Tracks/Punishes Combat Logs, Toggles PVP, And more!
body:
**DM ME ON DC [USER-WolfJTA] IF YOU WANT ME TO UPDATE THIS PLUGIN WITH A FEATURE YOU WANT OR TO HAVE ME MAKE A PLUGIN FOR YOU (FREEE)**

This plugin is a complete, all in one Combat Manager for your servers pvp needs. Features Include:
-Combat tagging
-Configurable Combat Duration (timer reset each hit, remaining time shown in boss bar)
-Configurable Escalting punishments on repeat offenses (of combat logging)
-Configurable Blacklisted commands during combat
-Confifurable Whitelisted Commands during combat
-Per-world PvP control - Enable/disable by dimension (eg, enabled in nether, disabled in overworld)
-Server-wide PvP toggle - Disable all PvP globally
-Temporary cooldowns - Disable PvP for X minutes
- World PvP management GUI (/pvp worlds)
- Admin Tools, Such As:
- /combatlog check <player> - Check offenses
- /combatlog reset <player> - Reset offenses
- /combatlog reload - Reload config
- [Optional] Vault Integration for combat logging fines
- Persistent Settings
- Safe zones - Radius-based PvP-free areas
- (Combat-tagged players can't enter safe zones)
- Zone list/management GUI (/pvp zone list)
  Thats all! Have fun! (i bet you didnt expect this much ay)
-After Fight Statistics (Accuracy, Aim, Crit %, Combo, Etc)
-Serverwide Win Messages
-Spawn Killing Protection
-Team Fight Scores & MVP Placement
